last_episode_to_air.name: Who Killed Aileen Seiden in Room 15?
last_episode_to_air.overview: Three people check into a Florida motel room. Only two walk out alive. "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant reports.

name: 48 Hours
overview: This newsmagazine series investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening — and resolution — of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart.

episodes.name: Return To Crack Street
episodes.overview: Two years after its breakthrough show 48 Hours "On Crack Street," the team returned with a three-hour special, "Return to Crack Street," in September 1989. The show featured an interview with Attorney General Dick Thornburgh and visits to Florida, Georgia, Arizona, Texas, and Minnesota. Bernard Goldberg reported, for example, from the South Bronx and Dan Rather was in the Essex County sheriff's office in Newark, New Jersey. Produced by Catherine Lasiewics, the show aired on September 14, 1989.

episodes.name: The Curse of Small Town U.S.A.
Dad's Double Life
episodes.overview: Scheduled: A report on Elizabeth Welsh, who discovered that her presumed-dead ex-husband was actually alive and living in Texas.

episodes.name: A Family Accused
episodes.overview: Scheduled: A look at a past investigation into a Massachusetts day-care center. Correspondents include Harold Dow and Susan Spencer.

episodes.name: A Time To Kill: Sterling Barber
episodes.overview: Scheduled: Bill Lagattuta is the correspondent for a report on modern-day attempts to solve crimes of the past. Included: how a Massachusetts state trooper solved a 20-year-old murder case; comments from the victim's family.

episodes.name: On the Edge of Your Seat
Why Did Josh Kill?
episodes.overview: Scheduled: “Why Did Josh Kill?” explores the 1998 murder of Maddie Clifton, an 8-year-old Jacksonville, Fla., girl who was killed by her 14-year-old neighbor Joshua Phillips, who said the death was accidental. Phillips, who had hidden the girl's body under his bed, received a life sentence for the crime.

episodes.name: A Mother Accused
episodes.overview: Scheduled: A report on Munchausen syndrome by proxy follows the case of a Florida woman convicted of child abuse for making her daughter sick as a way of gaining attention for herself. Correspondent: Harold Dow.

episodes.name: Class of 2000: Too Much Too Soon
Justice For Sheila? aka Murder For Hire? - Revisited
Who Killed Robert Adair? aka Murder in L.A.
Ghosts of Mississippi
episodes.overview: Several elderlies in a town in Mississippi dies one after the other.

episodes.name: A Grandmother's Mission aka Deadly Truth
The Colonel's Wife
episodes.overview: A report on retired Col. George Marecek, who was convicted in July 2000 of second-degree murder in the 1991 drowning death of his wife, Viparet, and sentenced to 30 years in prison. Dan Rather is the host.

episodes.name: Dead Certain aka Save Our Father
Bitter Pill: A Wife on Trial
Murder They Wrote: While Innocents Slept
Murder They Wrote: The End of the Dream Pt. 1
Murder They Wrote: The End of the Dream Pt. 2
Murder They Wrote: By Two and Two
Murder They Wrote: Murder in Spokane
Out of Control aka Parent Trap
A Lot to Lose - Atkins Controversy
To Hell and Back aka Abducted
A Question Of Guilt: The Bakley Murder
The Alibi: Disturbing the Peace I
Investigators
episodes.overview: Profiling former forensic scientist Elizabeth Divine, who is a technical consultant on “CSI: Crime Scene Investigation.”

episodes.name: Burden of Proof
episodes.overview: Following Beverly Watson's disappearance, her husband, Jim, became a top suspect. Police who investigated the Watson residence discovered no proofbut observed Jim applying cosmetics to disguise what seemed to be fingernails.

episodes.name: Lust, Lies and Videotape aka The Secret Tapes
Waiting on Women Warriors: Jessica Lynch
Hong Kong: Crowded City of Fear
Fog of War: Facing Friendly Fire
What's Love Got to Do With It?
The Secret Life of Eric Wright
Eat it Heavy Burden: Eat it Raw
Written in Blood
episodes.overview: An investigation into whether a screenplay about a murder written by two boys is fact or fiction. Lesley Stahl is the host.

episodes.name: Dark Side of the Mesa
episodes.overview: In the high desert, on the Rockies western slope, the Mesas tower over the town of Grand Junction, Colo., protected from the outside world. But on June 4, 2002, Grand Junction saw the unearthing of a shocking secret at the local landfill. The decomposed body of 34-year-old Jennifer Blagg was found wrapped in a red and black plastic tent. Jennifer and her six-year-old daughter, Abby, had been missing for seven months. Correspondent Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: The Canal Street Brothel; On the Verge of a Verdict
Secrets of the Well aka Cold Case Clay
Blood Feud
episodes.overview: An investigation into the 2004 Michigan murder of Bob Seaman in which his wife, Nancy, a fourth-grade teacher, is charged. Maureen Maher is the correspondent.

episodes.name: A Prescription For Murder?
episodes.overview: Chris Pittman shoots his grandparents at a close range and sets their house on fire.

episodes.name: The Man Who Knew Too Much
Two Wigs, a Gun and a Murder
Strange Truth
episodes.overview: The March 2003 murder of Ramona Krotine near Cleveland, is investigated. Her husband, Jeffrey, stood trial for the killing three times. Susan Spencer is the correspondent.

episodes.name: Defending Your Life
episodes.overview: An investigation into the 1988 murder of Lee Jones in Mill Creek, Wash., for which her husband, Jerry Jones Jr., stands trial for the third time. He was convicted in the first two trials, but the convictions were overturned. Peter Van Sant is the correspondent.

episodes.name: Secrets and Lies at Grapevine Lake
Scared to Death
episodes.overview: The 1995 murder of Vickie Barton in Springboro, Ohio, is investigated. Barton's husband, Jim, a former police officer, is accused of the crime. Peter Van Sant is the correspondent.

episodes.name: Sex, Lies and the Doctor's Wife
Texas Confidential
episodes.overview: The 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, a millionaire's wife who was found shot 13 times in her Houston home, is investigated. Bill Lagattuta is the correspondent.

episodes.name: Natalee Holloway: New Clues in Paradise
Dark Voyage
episodes.overview: The 2005 death of aspiring actress Ashley Barnett, who boarded a cruise ship to celebrate her 25th birthday but died a day later, is investigated. Bill Lagattuta is the correspondent.

episodes.name: The Sweetheart Murders
episodes.overview: The so-called "Sweetheart Murders" of Sabrina Gonsalves and John Riggins near Sacramento in 1980 are investigated.

episodes.name: Caught in the Crossfire
episodes.overview: Police looks into the involvement of a man whose wife was found dead after their marriage fails.

episodes.name: The Puppet Master
episodes.overview: Police try to determine who was calling the shots when a young mother was gunned down. Troy Roberts is the correspondent.

episodes.name: Death Without Mercy
episodes.overview: The 2005 death of James Michael in West Virginia is investigated and the chief suspect is his wife Michelle. Michael was found dead in his house after a fire that may have been intentionally set.

episodes.name: Stolen Dreams
episodes.overview: An investigation into a string of bank robberies on Long Island, N.Y., allegedly committed by Wall Street trader Stephen Trantel in 2003.

episodes.name: Deadline for Justice
episodes.overview: The 2002 murder of Abilene, Texas, news reporter Jennifer Servo and the 1991 rape and murder of Patricia Scoville in Vermont are investigated.

episodes.name: The Secret Life of Paige Birgfeld
Into Thin Air
episodes.overview: The 1976 disappearance of Jean Zapata, a wife and mother in Madison, Wis., is investigated.

episodes.name: Did the Doctor Kill the Doctor?
Blood and Money on Horseshoe Bay
Toxic
episodes.overview: The 2000 poisoning death of Eric Miller, a pediatric AIDS researcher in Raleigh, is investigated.

episodes.name: The Curious Case Of Colonel Shue
Did The Doctor Kill The Doctor? - Revisited
The Godfather's Daughter aka Their Father, The Godfather
Innocence Lost: The Yogurt Shop Murders
A Time To Kill: Michele Harris
The Girl Who Knew Too Much
Unmasking a Killer aka Hannibal Unmasked
One of Their Own
episodes.overview: The family of Sherri Rae Rasmussen calls for a probe into the Los Angeles Police Department's original investigation.

episodes.name: Dirty Little Secrets
episodes.overview: Vanessa Bulls, the former mistress of Waco, Texas, minister Matt Baker, testifies that he murdered his wife, Kari, in 2006 and tried to make it appear as if she committed suicide.

episodes.name: Taken: The Amber DuBois Story
episodes.overview: The murders of teens Amber Dubois and Chelsea King in California in 2009 and 2010, respectively, are investigated.

episodes.name: Chasing the Barefoot Bandit
episodes.overview: An investigation into the alleged criminal activity of 19-year-old Colton Harris-Moore, dubbed the Barefoot Bandit.

episodes.name: Fatal Choice
episodes.overview: The 2009 stabbing death of wealthy Ohio physician Peter Franklin is investigated. The victim's wife, Sandra, admits to stabbing him but she claims it was in self-defense.

episodes.name: The Dog Trainer, the Heiress and the Bodyguard - Part 1
The Dog Trainer, the Heiress and the Bodyguard - Part 2
Playing with Fire
episodes.overview: The 2002 murders of two men, Michael Tardio and Chris Monson, gunned down in Studio City, Cal., are investigated. The probe leads from the Playboy Mansion to Europe to a scandal on Wall Street.

episodes.name: The Facebook Detectives
episodes.overview: Three Texas women use Facebook to investigate the disappearance of their friend Lisa Stone, who vanished in June 2010.

episodes.name: Arturo Gattis Last Fight
episodes.overview: The 2009 death of boxer Arturo Gatti is investigated to determine whether he committed suicide or was murdered.

episodes.name: Amanda Knox: The Untold Story
episodes.overview:
Following the acquittal of Amanda Knox this week, "48 Hours Mystery" will broadcast "Amanda Knox: The Untold Story".

48 Hours reveals Knox's personal accounts of cruel manipulation and sexual intimidation while in prison. Plus, never-before-seen video diaries from Amanda's best friend, Madison Paxton, collected over 10 months. Paxton moved to Italy to support Amanda and help fight for her freedom.

episodes.name: Redemption Song
episodes.overview: After a murder rocks the Austin, Texas, music scene, a call to police from an angry wife blows the 26-year-old cold case wide open. Tracy Smith reports.

episodes.name: The Killing Fields
episodes.overview: Can a Hollywood movie help solve the most notorious killing spree in Texas? Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: Murder in the O.C.
episodes.overview: An update on the 1994 murder of millionaire William McLaughlin in his Newport Beach, Cal., home. Former NFL linebacker Eric Naposki was convicted of the crime, but he claims he is innocent and speaks about the case.

episodes.name: Private Needham's War
episodes.overview: A decorated soldier who was medievac-ed from Iraq and later diagnosed with traumatic brain injury (TBI) and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) remembers little of the beating that he gave his 19-year-old girlfriend who died from his hands.

episodes.name: Murder at the Manor
episodes.overview: A Cajun millionaire turned English gentleman becomes a suspect in a murder investigation.

episodes.name: Secrets of a Marriage
episodes.overview: The 2007 shooting death of Jocelyn Earnest, who was found in her Virginia home with a gun and a suicide note, is investigated. Her husband, Wesley, an assistant high-school principal, is a chief suspect in the case.

episodes.name: The Long Island Serial Killer
episodes.overview:
A major break in the Long Island Serial Killer case. The 18-month search for a missing New Jersey woman finally came to an end this week when police on Long Island, New York, announced the discovery remains believed to be 23-year-old Shannan Gilbert. On Saturday, Dec. 17, 2011, the remains were positively identified as Gilbert. As "48 Hours Mystery" correspondent Erin Moriarty reports, the search for Gilbert uncovered a greater mystery.

Erin Moriarty has the latest developments.

episodes.name: Family Affair
episodes.overview: In a small Southern town, an extramarital affair turns into a fatal family affair. Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: Showdown In The Bedroom
episodes.overview: A 25-year marriage comes to a violent end. Now, a jury must to decide -- did a wife have the right to kill? Richard Schlesinger reports.

episodes.name: A Fatal Attraction
episodes.overview:
Was a teenage girl involved in stabbing her own mother to death... and was it all over a boy?

Forbidden young love ends with a mother's violent murder. Richard Schlesinger reports.

episodes.name: Dark Side of Paradise
episodes.overview: When an American goes missing from his sailboat in the Caribbean, his nephew follows the trail with the help of a journalist-turned-manhunter. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Screenplay for Murder: The Diary of a “Dexter” Wannabe
episodes.overview:
When Gilles Tetreault arranged to meet a woman he met on an online dating site, he had no idea of the horror that would unfold. Tetreault says he came face-to-face with a madman who had set a trap to kill him. Tetreault was attacked and barely escaped with his life. Johnny Altinger answered a similar online dating ad and disappeared without a trace. Was there really a crime, or was this an elaborate setup for a screenplay for murder?

Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: Soccer Moms Confidential
episodes.overview: Maureen Maher’s report, “Soccer Moms Confidential,” uncovers the story behind the P.I. Moms, and investigates the man that started it all, Chris Butler. It’s a story allegedly fueled by fame, money, drugs and corruption. Interviews with key players, including the reporter who broke the story and the whistleblower who helped the DOJ bring Butler down, paint a disturbing portrait of an aggressive promoter, an alleged master manipulator. In a special appearance, Dr. Phil tells 48 HOURS what motivates a con man and how easily people are drawn in.

episodes.name: Fatal Episode: The Producer's Story
episodes.overview:
In April 2010, former reality television producer Bruce Beresford-Redman, his wife, Monica, and their two young children traveled to Cancun, Mexico for a family vacation. On April 8, Monica’s naked, beaten body was discovered in a sewer on the property of the Moon Palace Resort where the family was staying. The vacation was an attempt to save their troubled marriage. The Emmy-nominated producer became a prime suspect in the murder of his wife. 

Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: The Country Club Murders
episodes.overview: Professional poker player Ernie Scherer III is the chief suspect in the 2008 murders of his parents, Ernest Scherer Jr. and Charlene Abendroth, in their Pleasanton, Cal., home.

episodes.name: The Boy Next Door - Updated
episodes.overview: An update on the 1993 Tricia Pacaccio murder investigation near Chicago, as well as two other slayings and a brutal attack near Los Angeles. The crimes were allegedly committed by Michael Gargiulo, who knew or lived near all four victims.

episodes.name: Grave Injustice - Updated
episodes.overview: An update on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent 18 years in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

episodes.name: Arturo Gatti's Last Fight - Updated
episodes.overview: The dramatic conclusion: Two years after retiring, did world championship boxer Arturo Gatti kill himself or was he murdered? Erin Moriarty has the official findings and the answer to who gets his millions.

episodes.name: A Family's Honor
episodes.overview: The story of 20-year-old Noor Almaleki, a woman who was struck and killed by  her own father's accelerating SUV while she was crossing a parking lot in  suburban Phoenix, and how this was the first case in the U.S. prosecuted as an  "honor killing".Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: The Stranger Beside Me
episodes.overview: The story of Jamie Laiaddee, a woman who vanished from her home in March of  2010, and how her live-in boyfriend told everyone that she moved to Denver for  a new job, but detectives would soon discover that the boyfriend was a con man. Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: Mystery on Twin Peaks Drive
episodes.overview: The 1998 death of Ronda Reynolds in Toledo, Wash., is investigated to determine whether it was a suicide or a murder. Author Ann Rule, who wrote a book ("In the Still of the Night") on the case, is interviewed.

episodes.name: Death Wish
episodes.overview: After Jeffrey Locker's family reported him missing, New York City Police discovered the body of the Long Island businessman and motivational speaker slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem. Initially, it appeared that Locker had simply been in the wrong place at the wrong time; however, when authorities tracked Locker's ATM card to Kenneth Minor and questioned him, Minor made a startling allegation to the motive behind the murder: Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

episodes.name: The Writing on the Wall
episodes.overview: An investigation into the 2009 murders of the wife and two sons of a security chief for Joyce Meyer Ministries.

episodes.name: Ransom
episodes.overview: A complex case of kidnapping and extortion unfolds in the April 2008 vanishing of the son of a millionaire aviation-business owner. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: One of Their Own - Updated
episodes.overview: A cold case turns white hot as police finally charge one of their own in a 1986 murder case. Maureen Maher has an update.

episodes.name: The Sweetheart Murders
episodes.overview: Two murdered teens, a 32-year search for justice and eight years of reporting by "48 Hours". Troy Roberts has the latest in the investigation

episodes.name: Friends For Life
episodes.overview: An unfaithful husband is shot dead - do his wife and her best friend have a clue? Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: Collision Course
episodes.overview: A car crash leaves a young Air Force vet dead - but her boyfriend alive. The crash didn't kill her, what did? Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: The Preacher's Passion
episodes.overview: An actress is dead and her preacher boyfriend prays for answers. Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: Lina's Heart
episodes.overview: A beautiful wife and mother is suddenly dead. Would a twin really know if his brother was a killer? Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Secrets of the River
episodes.overview: A high school dancer and aspiring model is found dead. Did the killer videotape the murder? Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Highway of Tears
episodes.overview: A series of disappearances and murders of women and girls dating back four decades. Now, a break in the case. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Presumed Guilty
episodes.overview: A convicted killer's son believes his dad is innocent, but can he find the evidence to prove it? Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: The Hunt for Mr. Wright
episodes.overview: The hunt for convicted killer George Wright, who murdered war hero Walter Patterson in 1962 and then escaped from a New Jersey prison in 1970. Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: Everything to Lose
episodes.overview: A mother torments her daughter's killer, can she get him to confess? Richard Schlesinger reports.

episodes.name: Shattered Dreams
episodes.overview: A husband is suspected of killing his wife and drugging his children. Maureen Maher has the story.

episodes.name: The Perfect Family
episodes.overview: A former high-school valedictorian is charged with the murder of his mother in Michigan in 2011. Tracy Smith reports.

episodes.name: Picture Perfect: The Trial of Jodi Arias
episodes.overview: Accused killer Jodi Arias told all to "48 Hours" ... now her words are evidence in her life-or-death trial. Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: Crazy Love
episodes.overview: A brat, a Batman collector, filthy rich and dead - who killed Miami hotel heir Benji Novack? Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: Desperate Measures
episodes.overview: A married couple are assassinated in Wisconsin, but questions arise as to whether they were the intended targets. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Honor and Dishonor
episodes.overview: Two women shot dead by a soldier - can the Army get justice against one of its own?

episodes.name: The Accuser
episodes.overview: An examination of whether convicted killer Ryan Ferguson murdered Missouri sports editor Kent Heitholt in 2001. His accuser, Charles Erickson, who was also convicted of the crime, now claims Ferguson is innocent. Can "48 Hours" help him get his life back? Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: The Usual Suspect
episodes.overview: A girlfriend wears a wire to help police find the killer of her lover's wife. Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: Cold as Ice
episodes.overview: Can a childhood memory of a friend's murder solve a 55-year-old case? Correspondent Erin Moriarty goes inside the investigation of what authorities say is the oldest cold case ever prosecuted in the U.S.

episodes.name: Ambushed
episodes.overview: A son helps a new detective find his father's killer. Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: Power and Passion
episodes.overview: A powerful politician's girlfriend is shot dead. Did he love her to death? Richard Schlesinger reports.

episodes.name: Caught
episodes.overview: A special report on the manhunt and capture of the Boston Marathon bombing suspects

episodes.name: Muscle and Mayhem
episodes.overview: A gang of bodybuilders hatch a plan to kidnap and kill wealthy people. Correspondent Troy Roberts has the real story that inspired a new Hollywood movie.

episodes.name: Over the Edge
episodes.overview: A missing wife and a wild confession - what made a top chef jump from a California cliff? Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: Murder at Sea?
episodes.overview: New evidence in the case of George Smith who vanished on his honeymoon cruise. CBS News senior correspondent John Miller reports.

episodes.name: Unraveling the Lies of Jodi Arias
episodes.overview: Convicted of murder, "48 Hours" interviews were evidence in her trial. Will she be put to death? Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: The War in Chicago
episodes.overview: An honor student shot dead, an innocent victim of a gang war. An investigation into drugs, guns, gangs and the battle for Chicago. An investigation into drugs, guns, gangs and the battle for Chicago. Maureen Maher and Armen Keteyian report.

episodes.name: The Sweetheart Murders Updated
episodes.overview: Two murdered teens, a 32-year search for justice and eight years of reporting by "48 Hours". Troy Roberts has the latest in the investigation.

episodes.name: Spies, Lies & Secrets
episodes.overview: All new: A mother battles to prove her son died an American hero. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Death at Cottonwood  Creek
episodes.overview: Did a loving wife slip and fall off a cliff while posing for a snapshot or did her husband want more than a good picture? Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: aka Rockefeller
episodes.overview: The untold final chapter of the amazing "Clark Rockefeller" story. The con man and accused killer faces off with Erin Moriarty in an all-new network interview.

episodes.name: The Ghosts of Greenwich
episodes.overview: An update on the Michael Skakel murder case involving the death of Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Conn., in 1975.

episodes.name: Loved to Death
episodes.overview: All new: She was a popular teen, her ex was a football star. Their breakup was intense -- and she's dead. Ever hear of breakup violence? You will. Tracy Smith reports.

episodes.name: Relentless
episodes.overview: A heartbroken mother launches a one-woman psychological warfare campaign to taunt her daughter's alleged killer - but can she get him to crack? Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: The Devils Twin
episodes.overview: A young mother is dead and identical twins are the suspects. Did studying TV shows help them nearly pull off the perfect crime? Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: Hollywood Secrets
episodes.overview: An aspiring actress is brutally strangled. DNA was left all over the crime scene... leading police to a surprising suspect. Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: Walking Free
episodes.overview: Former Indiana State Trooper David Camm, tried three times for killing his wife and their two children, speaks out as part of a 13-year "48 Hours" investigation

episodes.name: Nelson Mandela: Father of a Nation
episodes.overview: A "48 Hours" special from the journalists of CBS News exploring the social, cultural and political impact of Mandela's life on the world.

episodes.name: Love, Hate & Obsession
episodes.overview: In the investigation of the murder of a one-time millionaire, both his ex-wife and son are suspects.

episodes.name: Death at the Parsonage
episodes.overview: Wives of a Pennsylvania Pastor Die in suspicious accidents. Was it coincidence or murder?

episodes.name: Perilous Journey
episodes.overview: An examination of the sometimes-shady business of international child adoptions.

episodes.name: A Bad Bet
episodes.overview: Did a bookie gamble away everything -- including his wife's life? Richard Schlesinger reports.

episodes.name: Death At Soho House
episodes.overview: Did the son of an Oscar-winning songwriter strangle his swimsuit designer girlfriend in a chic New York City hotel or was her death an accident?

episodes.name: Pain and Gain
episodes.overview: A gang of bodybuilders hatch a plan to kidnap and kill wealthy people. Troy Roberts has the real story that inspired a Hollywood movie.

episodes.name: The Last Confession
episodes.overview: A beauty queen is found murdered. The prime suspect -- the priest who heard her confession. Richard Schlesinger reports

episodes.name: The Blue River Murder
episodes.overview: A mother of three is found dead in a Colorado river. She had secrets -- did she name her own killer? Tracy Smith reports.

episodes.name: Fateful Connection
episodes.overview: A detective is haunted by the case of two women missing for 30 years. Now she’s hot on the trail of a killer -- can she catch him? Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: Last Chance
episodes.overview: He says he cracked under pressure and falsely confessed to the rape and murder of his young cousin -- what will it take for Damon Thibodeaux to walk free?

episodes.name: Wounded by Love
episodes.overview: A lover is shot dead - will cell phone video taken in the aftermath be enough to clear or convict? Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: Father and Son
episodes.overview: A teenager makes a discovery that could prove his mother's death was not suicide.

episodes.name: Decades of Deceipt
episodes.overview: Can a family find a young mother's murderer with help from a Facebook-savvy police officer?

episodes.name: Dangerous Beauty
episodes.overview: A beauty queen, a rock musician and a cross-country hunt for a cold-blooded killer. Peter Van Sant reports.

episodes.name: Temptation in Texas
episodes.overview: Sex, bondage, affairs and murder -- who killed a brilliant-but-feared Texas businessman?

episodes.name: A Raging Son
episodes.overview: A Weight Watchers executive is murdered by her Wall Street lawyer boyfriend. Did his mother’s neglect 30 years ago push him to kill? Troy Roberts investigates.

episodes.name: A Daughter, a Mortgage and Two Murders
episodes.overview: A couple killed, a daughter suspected - could a mortgage application lead to the killer? Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: End of the Trail
episodes.overview: The 2008 murder of Carol Kennedy in Arizona is investigated. The victim was beaten to death in her remote Prescott-area home.

episodes.name: One Last Hug
episodes.overview: A breakup, one last hug. Was a college student walking into her own murder?

episodes.name: Hollywood Secrets
episodes.overview: An aspiring actress is brutally strangled. DNA was left all over the crime scene... leading police to a surprising suspect. Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: The Trials of Cal Harris
episodes.overview: A businessman faces his third trial for the murder of his wife, after the first two were overturned on appeal.

episodes.name: Oscar Pistorius: Shots in the Dark
episodes.overview: A close friend of Olympic athlete Oscar Pistorious talks about his trial.

episodes.name: Blade Runner: The Verdict
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" goes inside the Oscar Pistorius case as experts and those closest to the Olympic sprinter react to a judge's ruling

episodes.name: Paradise Lost
episodes.overview: The investigation into the 2010 shooting death of Wall Street millionaire John Bender, who was killed in his exotic home in Costa Rica. His wife, Ann, is charged with the crime, but she claims she is innocent.

episodes.name: Mommy Dearest
episodes.overview: A report on a woman who was acquitted in the 1992 killing of her husband in Florida, but was charged with the attempted murder of her son in 2011 after he was shot in the neck - with the same gun - in Nevada.

episodes.name: The Hit
episodes.overview: An investigation into the death of an entrepreneur who was blown up in his car.

episodes.name: Kristen's Secret
episodes.overview: A former middle school athlete accuses a teacher of abuse.

episodes.name: The Pact
episodes.overview: 15-year-old boy goes to a dance and never returns. Teen killers keep a secret for 41 years – until one of them cracks. Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: Prison Diaries
episodes.overview: Former reality TV producer on trial for murdering his wife in 2010 speaks with "48 Hours" and turns the camera on himself for a look at life inside a Mexican prison

episodes.name: Devil's Island
episodes.overview: An ex-Marine, a secret life and a missing girlfriend -- was it murder? Peter Van Sant Investigates.

episodes.name: The Girl Next Door
episodes.overview: An ex-wife guns down her former husband -- did she break after being abused, or was it cold-blooded murder?

episodes.name: The Sober Truth
episodes.overview: A young woman, an alcoholic, thought she found help and a safe place -- what she found was a killer. Maureen Maher investigates.

episodes.name: The Two Faces of Todd Winkler
episodes.overview: Todd Winkler, a former fighter jet pilot, claims he was defending himself when he stabbed his wife to death with scissors.

episodes.name: Ultimatum
episodes.overview: The daughters of a businesswoman who was gunned down look for her killer.

episodes.name: Murder in Pinyon Pines
episodes.overview: A California couple is shot dead, a daughter's body found burned in a wheelbarrow - after seven years investigators think they have solved the case, but a courtroom bombshell changes everything.

episodes.name: Kiss of Death and the Google Exec
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" investigates the mysterious death of a tech executive and his last night with an exotic beauty on his yacht -- captured on video

episodes.name: The Millionaire, the Model & the Hit Man
episodes.overview: Accusations that a millionaire health supplement distributor hired a hit man to kill his model wife of seven years.

episodes.name: Gone
episodes.overview: A Texas man tells Dr. Phil he’s desperate to find his missing ex-girlfriend. 48 hours later, he tells police something different. Where’s the truth? Tracy Smith investigates.

episodes.name: Dangerous Games
episodes.overview: A bright college student lured into the world of bondage and domination by a friend. She said no -- and didn’t survive the night. Was it murder? Troy Roberts investigates.

episodes.name: Fall From Grace
episodes.overview: Was an alleged religious cult responsible for a young bride’s death? "48 Hours"' Troy Roberts investigates.

episodes.name: Blaming Melissa
episodes.overview: A day care worker convicted of killing a toddler recants her confession.

episodes.name: Murder in Aspen
episodes.overview: The murder of an Aspen, Colo., heiress produces many suspects.

episodes.name: Bruce Beresford-Redman: The Verdict
episodes.overview: A reality show producer gets 12 years in prison for killing his wife in Mexico – a crime he told "48 Hours" he didn't commit. Is it over? Troy Roberts reports.

episodes.name: Cold Case: Who Killed Amy Gellert?
episodes.overview: Help cops solve a 20-year-old case. A young woman killed, her family brutally stabbed – someone out there knows something ... is it you? Erin Moriarty reports.

episodes.name: The Bizarre Saga of Robert Durst
episodes.overview: A millionaire surrounded by wealth and death is charged with killing a friend 15 years ago -- in an exclusive interview with "48 Hours", his attorney vows to fight back

episodes.name: The Pretender
episodes.overview: A family murdered, the husband’s on the run posing as a New York Times reporter. The true story behind a new Hollywood movie.

episodes.name: The Accidental Husband
episodes.overview: Two wives die in freak accidents 17 years apart. One man was married to both women. Is he just unlucky or does he know more than he’s telling?

episodes.name: Death After Midnight
episodes.overview: Ashley Fallis' New Year's Day death was initially ruled a suicide, and the case was closed after Evans police investigated the incident in 2012. Evans Police Chief Rick Brandt reopened the case in April 2014 after receiving previously unheard witness accounts and claims that officers mishandled the investigation.

episodes.name: To Catch A Genius
episodes.overview: A successful wife dead from nicotine poisoning. Her genius husband beat "Jeopardy!" -- can he beat a murder rap? Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: The Verdict
episodes.overview: A wife says she shot her husband in self-defense. Police say she’s a killer. Who's correct? "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates. This week's "48 Hours" begins with a surprising twist – the verdict is revealed in the first few minutes of the show. Correspondent Peter Van Sant explains why.

episodes.name: A Vision of Murder
episodes.overview: A Florida mother claims she saw the murder of a friend in a dream. Is she clairvoyant or is she a killer? Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Father and Son: The Verdict
episodes.overview: CASE UPDATE: A son is determined to prove his father, a doctor, killed his mother, a noted scientist. Will a jury believe him? Correspondent Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: Janet's Secret
episodes.overview: She was murdered at 23. Five suspects and cops couldn’t arrest anyone. It was the perfect crime for 34 years--until now. Correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Cal Harris: Deadlocked
episodes.overview: Tried a third time for killing his wife, a wealthy businessman vows he’s innocent. Will a jury finally believe him?

episodes.name: Last Chance for Freedom
episodes.overview:
A Florida man's questionable conviction in a 1989 murder may be an example of what can happen when investigators disregard the venerable British mystery writer's caution.

This Saturday, "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty reports on the case of Crosley Green. There is new evidence that Green may have been wrongfully convicted of the murder of 22-year-old Charles "Chip" Flynn more than 25 years ago. Green is currently serving a life sentence in Florida. Prosecutors and investigators in this case have faced allegations that they manipulated facts to fit their version of the truth - that Green committed the crime.

episodes.name: Temptation in Texas: Update
episodes.overview: A "48 Hours" interview with the wife of a millionaire shot dead turns the case upside down. Is there more to the story? Peter Van Sant updates the case.

episodes.name: Death on the Hudson
episodes.overview: An investigation into whether a New York woman killed her fiancé during a kayaking trip on the Hudson River.

episodes.name: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections [Part 1]
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" goes inside the investigation of the death of the UVA student and the evidence that links the alleged killer to other crimes spanning a decade. Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: Hannah Graham: Stalked by Evil [Part 2]
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" goes inside the investigation of the death of the UVA student and the evidence that links the alleged killer to other crimes spanning a decade. Susan Spencer reports.

episodes.name: The Doctor's Daughter
episodes.overview:
Hearing her father's screams for help, Jenna Neulander dialed 9-1-1 and summoned first responders to her home. Her father, Dr. Robert Neulander, a prominent obstetrician, was trying to help her mother, Leslie, who was unresponsive in the shower.

Eighteen months after Leslie Neulander died, her husband was charged with her murder. One of the key witnesses in the case? Their daughter, Jenna. But does her 9-1-1 call help the prosecution or the defense?

episodes.name: Shadow of Death
episodes.overview: A couple shot dead in bed. It looked like a hit job. Was it a business deal gone bad or was the enemy closer to home? "48 Hours" correspondent Troy Roberts investigates.

episodes.name: Vengeance in Vegas
episodes.overview: A beautiful mom is murdered while her West Point grad husband was at work. Was someone stalking women in Las Vegas? "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: The Hunter: Searching for Kelli Bordeaux
episodes.overview: When a young U.S. Army combat medic goes missing, a bounty hunter takes on his biggest case ever. "48 Hours" correspondent Troy Roberts investigates.

episodes.name: The Bugs Bunny Defense
episodes.overview: Did a cartoon play a part in the death of a California man? "48 Hours" correspondent Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: Paris Under Attack
episodes.overview: As the world reacts to the attacks in Paris, CBS News reports on the shootings, the aftermath and what's being done to prevent similar incidents worldwide

episodes.name: The Accidental Husband: Update
episodes.overview: 48 Hours re-examines and updates the case of Harold Henthorn whose wives Lynn and Toni died 17 years apart in what were supposedly freak accidents. Police investigators, however, believe that Harold murdered them. Eventually, Harold is arrested and convicted of first-degree murder.

episodes.name: The Strange Case of Kurt Sonnenfeld
episodes.overview: A man wanted in the murder of his wife makes an outrageous claim – the U.S. wants to silence him for what he saw at Ground Zero

episodes.name: Road to Redemption
episodes.overview: 48 Hours looks at the 1990 murders of Richard and Nancy Bishop Langert by David Biro in Chicago, Illinois. It examines how Nancy's sister Jeanne through her Christian faith has learned to cope with the deaths and has even forgiven her sister's murderer.

episodes.name: Dear Savanna
episodes.overview: 48 Hours examines the case of Dorothy Lee who kidnapped her daughter in the middle of a bitter divorce with her then-husband Harris Todd. She eluded the FBI for two decades eventually settling in Australia. Recently arrested she tells her side of the story and her daughter reflects on the past she never knew about.

episodes.name: Murder in Aspen (II)
episodes.overview: 48 Hours updates its story on the 2014 murder of heiress Nancy Pfister in Aspen, Colorado. Trey Styler was convicted after his confession to the crime. He has since committed suicide while in prison. His wife has changed her name and moved to a different state.

episodes.name: Love and Death in Alaska (III) (Part 1)
episodes.overview: Is Mechele Linehan a conniving ex-stripper who should be in jail for murder, or was she unfairly targeted by police because of a past life? Susan Spencer investigates.

episodes.name: Love and Death in Alaska (III) (Part 2)
episodes.overview: Is Mechele Linehan a conniving ex-stripper who should be in jail for murder, or was she unfairly targeted by police because of a past life? Susan Spencer investigates

episodes.name: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongfully Convicted
episodes.overview: Convicted of murder at 19 -- 14 appeals and 10 years later, he's free. They got it wrong. End of story? Not yet. "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Murder 90210
episodes.overview: Can millionaire Robert Durst beat another murder rap?

episodes.name: Target Justice
episodes.overview: A Texas town on edge -- someone was killing prosecutors. Was it a gang hit or could the killer be one of their own? "48 Hours" correspondent Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: What Did The Children See?
episodes.overview: What happens when a former hard-charging prosecutor is prosecuted for his wife's murder in his old courtroom? "48 Hours"' Maureen Maher investigates.

episodes.name: A Student Of Murder
episodes.overview: Was the shooting of a Seattle man a random incident of road rage, or was the gunman a self-taught killer intent on finding the perfect moment to kill? Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Playing By The Rules?
episodes.overview: A popular football coach is serving life for killing his pregnant wife -- was evidence hidden that could set him free? "48 Hours" correspondent Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: Eliminating The Threat
episodes.overview: An elite FBI agent shoots his wife after he says she came after him with a knife -- was it self-defense or murder? "48 Hours" correspondent Susan Spencer investigates.

episodes.name: What Happened In Apt. 1601?
episodes.overview: Three friends walk into a studio apartment, and only two come out alive. At least one of them is a killer, but which one? Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: A Mother Accused
episodes.overview: In her only interview, a mother convicted of murder by poisoning her son with salt claims it was the hospital's mistake. Is she right?

episodes.name: The Last Confession Revisited
episodes.overview: Five decades after the murder of the beautiful school teacher, her long suspected killer -- a former priest -- is in custody. A new witness stepped forward, but despite this new evidence, there would still be no indictment ... until now.

episodes.name: Breaking Point
episodes.overview: A lawyer shot -- his girlfriend admits she pulled the trigger and then dances in a strange police video -- was it self-defense or love gone bad? "48 Hours"' Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Obsessed
episodes.overview: A lawyer shot dead at home - his girlfriend admits she pulled the trigger and then dances, twirls and snaps her fingers in a strange police video. Was it self-defense or love gone bad?

episodes.name: Blood In The Sand
episodes.overview: Two teens killed on the same California beach six years apart. DNA on one of the victims leads to two suspects -- one of them worked for the police. Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: The Soldier's Wife
episodes.overview: A young wife shot dead -- her soldier husband pulled the trigger. Was it an accident or was it murder?

episodes.name: Death Of An Olympian
episodes.overview: Olympic hero Dave Laut shot six times -- his wife pulled the trigger. Was it murder or self-defense? In her first TV interview, Jane Laut tells Erin Moriarty she's been hiding a secret.

episodes.name: The Spymasters - CIA in the Crosshairs Part 1
episodes.overview: Part 1: All 12 living CIA directors share their passionate disagreements about the agency's past, its current mission, and its future

episodes.name: The Spymasters - CIA in the Crosshairs Part 2
episodes.overview: All 12 living CIA directors share their passionate disagreements about the agency's past, its current mission, and its future

episodes.name: Cal Harris: The Final Verdict
episodes.overview: Over the past nine years, Cal Harris has gone on trial for the murder of his wife, Michele, four times. He was convicted twice, even though Michele's body has never been found. Both verdicts were overturned. A third jury couldn't decide. Now a fourth trial. Will this be the final one for Cal Harris?

episodes.name: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections (Updated)
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" goes inside the investigation of the death of the UVA student, the evidence that links one man to three horrific crimes, and now, his punishment. Susan Spencer reports. (Updated)

episodes.name: Bringing a Nation Together
episodes.overview: A "48 Hours" special on the aftermath of the deadly police shootings in Dallas -- what will it take for America to heal?

episodes.name: Death and the Dentist
episodes.overview: In his only TV interview, a New York dentist vows that he didn't kill his lover's husband, who happens to be his best friend. Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: Killer App
episodes.overview: A teenage girl was lured to her death using a smartphone app.

episodes.name: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie
episodes.overview: An investigation into the 1996 murder of a Texas widow that inspired the Jack Black movie "Bernie." At the heart of the probe is whether a mortician killed her and froze her body in order to live off her millions or to end years of abuse.

episodes.name: Killer Performance
episodes.overview: A young woman is murdered, police thought her killer was on the run ... or was he? Correspondent Tracy Smith investigates.

episodes.name: Shadow of Death
episodes.overview: A stunning new twist in the case of a couple shot dead in bed. It looked like a hit job, but was it? "48 Hours" Troy Roberts and Erin Moriarty investigate.

episodes.name: Driven to Extremes
episodes.overview: A Texas-sized case of love, infidelity, road rage and possibly murder. "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Death After Midnight
episodes.overview: A Colorado mom of three shot dead in her bedroom -- was it murder or suicide? "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Bad Boy
episodes.overview: A young mom vanishes after visiting her ex-husband -- could his accidental "butt dial" to 911 hold clues to what happened? CBS News correspondent Michelle Miller investigates.

episodes.name: Buried Truth
episodes.overview: Real estate broker Todd Kohlhepp kept a woman chained for two months; now he says he killed seven people -- "48 Hours" unravels the twisted life of an alleged serial killer.

episodes.name: Sophia's Secret
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" Live to Tell: A teen attacked by her abusive ex-boyfriend -- held at knifepoint, her room set on fire -- reveals her emotional story of survival to Tracy Smith.

episodes.name: Hunted
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" goes inside the mind of a serial rapist hunting his victims while two detectives were hunting him. Correspondent Maureen Maher investigates.

episodes.name: The Long Road Home
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" Live to Tell: A father and basketball star is caught in a terror attack. Sebastien Bellin's remarkable story of recovery. CBS News correspondent Vladimir Duthiers reports.

episodes.name: The Psychiatrist and the Selfie
episodes.overview: Jacob Nolan, who claims his psychiatrist programmed him to kill her ex-lover, speaks out for the first time to "48 Hours" correspondent Peter Van Sant.

episodes.name: Target Justice
episodes.overview: A Texas town on edge -- someone was killing prosecutors. Was it a gang hit or could the killer be one of their own? "48 Hours" correspondent Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: The Fight for Melissa
episodes.overview: A day care worker says she loved kids, yet she's in prison for killing one. If she didn't do it, why did she confess? "48 Hours"' Erin Moriarty has the latest in the Melissa Calusinski case.

episodes.name: The Birthday Party
episodes.overview: "48 Hours" Live to Tell: Despite being blindfolded, kidnap victim Stanley Alpert was later able to lead the FBI to his captors. Special Agent Richard Meade explains how what Alpert remembered helped to solve this case.

episodes.name: 48 Hours Presents: Road to Redemption
episodes.overview: Can a woman end 25 years of pain by forgiving her sister and brother-in-law's killer? "48 Hours" correspondent Maureen Maher reports.

episodes.name: Mommy Dearest
episodes.overview: A Palm Beach socialite kills her ex-husband and serves no time -- 20 years later, with the same gun, another family member is shot. "48 Hours" correspondent Richard Schlesinger investigates.

episodes.name: 48 Hours Presents: Janet's Secret
episodes.overview: She was murdered at 23. Five suspects and cops couldn't arrest anyone. It was the perfect crime for 34 years -- until now. Correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Crime and Punishment
episodes.overview: A stepfather sits in prison for killing his wife. Her daughters vow to keep him there. Does he deserve parole? Correspondent Tracy Smith investigates.

episodes.name: Innocence Lost
episodes.overview: The murder of four young girls leads to two murder convictions -- but then everything fell apart; 25 years later, there's new DNA evidence. "48 Hours"' Erin Moriarty has the latest on the case she says she can't forget.

episodes.name: Devil's Island
episodes.overview: An ex-Marine with a secret life and a secret wife. A five-year investigation turns on shocking DNA evidence -- is the one-time hero a killer, too? "48 Hours"' Peter Van Sant has the latest in the case.

episodes.name: Who Killed Kay Wenal?
episodes.overview: Help solve a murder case: a former model brutally killed in her Georgia home. Someone out there knows something ... is it you? "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
episodes.overview: Two friends convicted of rape claim neither did it. Their families stuck by them. Now, more than 20 years later, a new DNA test will change everything. "48 Hours" correspondent Maureen Maher investigates.

episodes.name: Murder in Beverly Hills
episodes.overview: Who killed a Las Vegas mob boss's daughter? Could the answers be in an unprecedented interview with millionaire Robert Durst? "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
episodes.overview: A wealthy doctor is violently murdered in his Florida mansion -- could a dark secret from his past provide a clue to his killer? Correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates.

episodes.name: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
episodes.overview: A Florida doctor brutally murdered - her husband has an airtight alibi, but police travel 1,100 miles for a suspect that looks exactly like the dead doctor's husband. "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Stalking: Out of the Shadows
episodes.overview: Singer Christina Grimmie was killed by a stalker and Ivanka Trump has been stalked, too; now, an "NCIS" star is trying to change stalking laws. "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Stalked
episodes.overview: Actress Pauley Perrette's push for stronger legislation that would better protect stalking victims.

episodes.name: The Widow on Solway Road
episodes.overview: One woman, two husbands dead under strange circumstances - could she be that unlucky? "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Moment of Truth
episodes.overview: A daughter hears her father's last words - can she help convict his killer?

episodes.name: Operation Murder
episodes.overview: When two Texas doctors meet, it seems like true love -- but police say the couple had some unfinished business with their former partners.

episodes.name: Red Notice for Murder
episodes.overview: A Brooklyn woman turns to a New York private eye for help tracking down a Russian beauty she believes robbed and killed her mother. Can they find her?

episodes.name: Storm of Suspicion
episodes.overview: Texas mother Crystal McDowell vanished just before Hurricane Harvey hit the Houston area. "48 Hours" followed investigators on their search for the missing mom.

episodes.name: Reality Kills
episodes.overview: Was an Atlanta detective's investigation into an alleged rape and shooting death case influenced by cameras following her for a TV reality show? "48 Hours" correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.

episodes.name: Secrets of Waco
episodes.overview: A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly 1993 standoff with law enforcement in Waco, Texas.

episodes.name: Grapes of Wrath
episodes.overview: Ambition, greed and gunshots at a Napa Valley winery -- how did a bag with $800,000 in cash lead to murder in a vineyard?

episodes.name: The Evidence Room
episodes.overview: Accused of murder, a young woman's life hangs in the balance. "48 Hours" goes behind the scenes with her defense team and a forensic animator as they strategize how to present their theory of what happened - will a jury believe them?

episodes.name: In the Name of Hate
episodes.overview: A brilliant Ivy League student is murdered after he went to a California park with a former high school classmate. The parents of Blaze Bernstein, allegedly murdered because he was gay and Jewish, tell their story. Correspondent Tracy Smith investigates.

episodes.name: Live to Tell: Standoff at Trader Joe's
episodes.overview: How a group of people, afraid they would die after being taken hostage by a gunman, banded together in the aisles of a supermarket to survive.

episodes.name: Widow's War
episodes.overview: An investigation of the death of a decorated Marine colonel in 2008 Iraq and his wife's decade-long quest to get it labeled a homicide.
